titleStmt.title: SII 40.9: original edition by K. Munirathnam
No. 9. (A.R. No. B. 431 of 1929.) Velukūru, Chittoor Taluk, Chittoor District, Andhra Pradesh.

summary.p: On a slab fixed before the Mādhavanārāyaṇa perumaḷ temple in the village.
This is dated Śaka 1566, Tāraṇa, Āśvija śu. 12, corresponding to 1644 A.D., October 3, Thursday.
Records the gift of a village Vēlkūru along with its hamlets as sarvamānya, situated in Yiruvāra-paṭṭu in Chittūru-sīma to Vēdamārga-Pratishṭhāpanāchārya Kandāḷa Bhāvanāchārya by the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī vijayādbha(bhyu)daya śāli
vāhana śakavaruṣaṁbbulu 15
66 Agunaneḍi tāraṇa saṁ
vvatsara Āśvija śu 12 lu śrīma
tē rāmānujāya namaḥ śrīmadvēda
mā¨rga pratiṣṭāpanācāryulayi
na vubhaya vēdāṁttācāryulayi
na kaṁdāḷa bhāvanācāryulayya
vāriki śrīmadrājādhirāja rāja
paramēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrī
vīra śrīraṁgarāyadēvamahā
rāyalayyagāru vēlūraratna
siṁhāsanārūḍhulayi pṛthvī
visāmrājyaṁ śēyucuṁ
ḍaṁgānu cittūri śīmalōnu yi
ruvārapaḍḍugrāmamulalō vēlū
kūri grāmaṁ Aṁduku cellē pallelu
sahānu yī śu 12 lu nāṁḍu
dhārāgra¨rvvitaṁggānu sama¨rppi
ṁccināraṁ ganaku putrapautrapā
raṁparyayaṁgānu Ācaṁdrā
¨rkasthāhigānu Anubhavi
ṁccigalavāru Idē bhūdāna
śilāśāsanaṁ . svadattā dvigu
ṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupāla
naṁ paradattāpahārēṇa sva
dattā niṣpalaṁ bhavēt
śrīrāmajayaṁ
Digital edition of SII 40.9 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
